task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements are fully met: (1) RenameRequest struct exists in api/types.go with Source and Destination fields correctly json-tagged; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTs to /api/rename; (3) RenameHandler in server/routes.go copies the model via CopyModel, deletes source via srcManifest.Remove(), returns 404 (StatusNotFound) when source missing, and 409 (StatusConflict) when destination exists; (4) Route r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) is registered; (5) CLI command "rename SOURCE DESTINATION" uses cobra.ExactArgs(2); (6) CLI RenameHandler calls client.Rename with proper request object; (7) No existing test files or code modified. Implementation is complete, handles edge cases (path validation, duplicate detection, orphaned layer cleanup), and includes OpenAPI documentation.
